Our Craft

BORN FROM TRADITION

Every grain of basmati tells a story. Our biryanis are layered the old way — spice by spice, slow-cooked in sealed dum pots until the aroma fills every corner. This is not fast food. This is memory served on a plate.

Tray Service Menu

OUR MENU

All items priced per tray · Small / Medium / Large

Our Story

ABOUT US

Rooted in tradition. Cooked with love.

Who We Are

A KITCHEN BUILT ON HERITAGE

Biryani Temptations was born from a deep love for the rich culinary traditions of Hyderabad — a city where biryani isn't just a dish, it's a way of life. Every recipe we serve carries generations of knowledge, cooked the slow and intentional way.

Located in the heart of Canoga Park, we bring authentic Indian flavors to Los Angeles — one tray at a time. Whether you're ordering for a small family gathering or a grand celebration of hundreds, our commitment to quality never wavers.

Our team hand-grinds spices daily, sources the finest aged basmati, and seals every biryani in true dum style — the ancient method that traps all the aroma inside until the moment it's served.
